description: In Cargo.toml, tokio is declared as a mandatory dependency (no optional = true). Because sign_sync is cfg-gated on algorithm features, tokio compiles unconditionally even for users who enable no algorithm features and use only the SecretError/SigningBackend re-exports. Fix: add optional = true to the tokio dep and activate it from each algorithm feature: ed25519 = ["dep:ed25519", "dep:tokio"], ecdsa-p256 = ["dep:p256", "dep:tokio"], rsa-pss = ["dep:rsa", "dep:tokio"].
title: tokio should be an optional dep activated by algorithm features
